events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Scenario: view of NM/MC cable routing & protection cuts off area where exposure control would be visible. Crew location and energy/fall boundary cannot be determined. Need evaluate field condition. Since critical safety info missing, decision likely needs_more_info. But if dangerous or non-compliant, decision must be fail. We have insufficient evidence to determine hazard. Need state immediate controls required? Since cannot determine exposure control visible, need stop work until verify protection. But decision maybe fail because the area where exposure control would be visible is cut off, meaning cannot confirm protection, but not necessarily non-compliant. The task: spot unsafe conditions and state immediate controls. The view cuts off area where exposure control visible; crew location/boundary cannot be determined. So we need more info. Risk maybe medium due to uncertainty. Work stage in-progress. Findings: field of view excludes cable protection/exposure control zone; unable to verify clearance/boundary. Actions: expand inspection view, verify physical guarding/derating, confirm worker position relative to boundaries, do not continue until protection confirmed. References NEC 300.4, 334, 330. Need JSON shape. component_conditions none flagged, empty list. percent_complete unknown maybe 50? value 0. sound_source etc default. order empty, workable empty. confidence maybe 0.6. event_time 0, rate 0. Let's craft JSON.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "needs_more_info",
  "risk": "medium",
  "work_stage": "in-progress",
  "component_conditions": [],
  "percent_complete": 50,
  "value": 0,

  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Camera frame cuts off the cable protection/exposure-control zone; cannot verify NM/MC protection against physical damage.",
    "Crew location and energy/fall-protection boundary cannot be determined from the provided view.",
    "Cannot confirm compliance with NEC 300.4 protection requirements for NM/MC cable."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop or hold work in the affected area until the full cable run and protection can be inspected.",
    "Reposition/expand the field of view to include the exposure-control area and any guards, grommets, or sleeves.",
    "Verify crew position relative to energy-isolation and fall-protection boundaries before work resumes.",
    "Confirm NM/MC cable is protected from physical damage per NEC 300.4/334/330 before continuing."
  ],
  "rationale": "The provided frame does not show the area where cable protection/exposure controls would be visible, so a definitive pass/fail determination cannot be made. Because the crew location and safety boundaries are unknown, the safest immediate action is to hold work and gather more information.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 300.4",
    "NEC 334",
    "NEC 330"
  ]
}
